title: helianthus cochinchinensis
intro: Helianthus cochinchinensis is a type of flowering plant, also known as the cochlearia or yellow chamomile, which is native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helianthus cochinchinensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
